lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello! What are you doing here?

lines.speaker: Dark wizard
lines.text: Hello, I am here to investigate rumours of a dark magical presence in these lands.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What rumours have you heard exactly?

lines.speaker: Dark wizard
lines.text: I've heard there are hidden ruins in the mountains here with the power to re-animate beings from the dead. Zandar Horfyre sent me to study them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know where in the mountains these ruins are?

lines.speaker: Dark wizard
lines.text: Sadly no but I will find them, I will begin looking for information in Arceeus, they seem like my kind of people.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: If you say so, good luck.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you doing here?

lines.speaker: Dark wizard
lines.text: I'm working on combining the dark teleportation magic of these lands into physical form.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Kind of like teleportation tablets?

lines.speaker: Dark wizard
lines.text: Yes, but not made quite the same way.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I do that?

lines.speaker: Dark wizard
lines.text: If you must. That lectern over there contains the book I've been working on.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you reading?

lines.speaker: Dark wizard
lines.text: I am seeking to understand more about the dark powers present in these lands. Now leave me be, there is much to be learned.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you doing here?

lines.speaker: Dark wizard
lines.text: I'm working on combining the dark teleportation magic of these lands into physical form.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Kind of like teleportation tablets?

lines.speaker: Dark wizard
lines.text: Yes, but not made quite the same way.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I do that?

lines.speaker: Dark wizard
lines.text: If you must. That lectern over there contains the book I've been working on.
